A3 = 3*x220^4*beta - 12*x220^3*x320*beta + 18*x220^2*x320^2*beta - 12*x220*x320^3*beta + 3*x320^4*beta 

B3 = + 21*x210*x220^3*beta - 63*x210*x220^2*x320*beta + 63*x210*x220*x320^2*beta - 21*x210*x320^3*beta - 3*x220^6 + 18*x220^5*x320 - 45*x220^4*x320^2 - 21*x220^3*x310*beta + 60*x220^3*x320^3 + 63*x220^2*x310*x320*beta - 45*x220^2*x320^4 - 63*x220*x310*x320^2*beta + 18*x220*x320^5 + 21*x310*x320^3*beta - 3*x320^6 

C3 = + 57*x210^2*x220^2*beta - 114*x210^2*x220*x320*beta + 57*x210^2*x320^2*beta - 30*x210*x220^5 + 150*x210*x220^4*x320 - 300*x210*x220^3*x320^2 - 114*x210*x220^2*x310*beta + 300*x210*x220^2*x320^3 + 228*x210*x220*x310*x320*beta - 150*x210*x220*x320^4 - 114*x210*x310*x320^2*beta + 30*x210*x320^5 + 30*x220^5*x310 - 150*x220^4*x310*x320 + 300*x220^3*x310*x320^2 + 57*x220^2*x310^2*beta - 300*x220^2*x310*x320^3 - 114*x220*x310^2*x320*beta + 150*x220*x310*x320^4 + 57*x310^2*x320^2*beta - 30*x310*x320^5

D3 =  + 72*x210^3*x220*beta - 72*x210^3*x320*beta - 129*x210^2*x220^4 + 516*x210^2*x220^3*x320 - 774*x210^2*x220^2*x320^2 - 216*x210^2*x220*x310*beta + 516*x210^2*x220*x320^3 + 216*x210^2*x310*x320*beta - 129*x210^2*x320^4 + 258*x210*x220^4*x310 - 1032*x210*x220^3*x310*x320 + 1548*x210*x220^2*x310*x320^2 + 216*x210*x220*x310^2*beta - 1032*x210*x220*x310*x320^3 - 216*x210*x310^2*x320*beta + 258*x210*x310*x320^4 - 129*x220^4*x310^2 + 516*x220^3*x310^2*x320 - 774*x220^2*x310^2*x320^2 - 72*x220*x310^3*beta + 516*x220*x310^2*x320^3 + 72*x310^3*x320*beta - 129*x310^2*x320^4 

E3 = + 36*x210^4*beta - 306*x210^3*x220^3 + 918*x210^3*x220^2*x320 - 918*x210^3*x220*x320^2 - 144*x210^3*x310*beta + 306*x210^3*x320^3 + 918*x210^2*x220^3*x310 - 2754*x210^2*x220^2*x310*x320 + 2754*x210^2*x220*x310*x320^2 + 216*x210^2*x310^2*beta - 918*x210^2*x310*x320^3 - 918*x210*x220^3*x310^2 + 2754*x210*x220^2*x310^2*x320 - 2754*x210*x220*x310^2*x320^2 - 144*x210*x310^3*beta + 918*x210*x310^2*x320^3 + 306*x220^3*x310^3 - 918*x220^2*x310^3*x320 + 918*x220*x310^3*x320^2 + 36*x310^4*beta - 306*x310^3*x320^3

F3 =  - 423*x210^4*x220^2 + 846*x210^4*x220*x320 - 423*x210^4*x320^2 + 1692*x210^3*x220^2*x310 - 3384*x210^3*x220*x310*x320 + 1692*x210^3*x310*x320^2 - 2538*x210^2*x220^2*x310^2 + 5076*x210^2*x220*x310^2*x320 - 2538*x210^2*x310^2*x320^2 + 1692*x210*x220^2*x310^3 - 3384*x210*x220*x310^3*x320 + 1692*x210*x310^3*x320^2 - 423*x220^2*x310^4 + 846*x220*x310^4*x320 - 423*x310^4*x320^2

G3 = - 324*x210^5*x220 + 324*x210^5*x320 + 1620*x210^4*x220*x310 - 1620*x210^4*x310*x320 - 3240*x210^3*x220*x310^2 + 3240*x210^3*x310^2*x320 + 3240*x210^2*x220*x310^3 - 3240*x210^2*x310^3*x320 - 1620*x210*x220*x310^4 + 1620*x210*x310^4*x320 + 324*x220*x310^5 - 324*x310^5*x320 

H3 = - 108*x210^6 + 648*x210^5*x310 - 1620*x210^4*x310^2 + 2160*x210^3*x310^3 - 1620*x210^2*x310^4 + 648*x210*x310^5 - 108*x310^6
